_notes: Canon Europa MIM teams — Oracle/Informatica estate

65501787.msg: INC-CN-00142: 7 Informatica jobs failed, 24 transit files stuck. Auto-recovery initiated — batch reset, file moves, restarts.
Confirmed — checking downstream impact on EBS and Pearlchain feeds.
All 7 jobs restarted successfully. 24 transit files processed. Downstream feeds — EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain — all active.
Confirmed healthy. Good resolution. MTTR 18 min vs 4-6h manual.

65504576.msg: INC-CN-00141: 38 WSH concurrent requests stuck. MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE pending. Auto-reprocessing 32 eligible orders via WSHFSTRX.
Finance confirmed — month-end revenue booking at risk. Proceeding with reprocessing.
32 orders cleared. 6 require DB-level fix — DBA and Finance approval requested.
Approving DB fix for 6 orders. Please proceed.
All 38 orders closed. Revenue recognition unblocked. MTTR 28 min vs 3-4h manual.

65505018.msg: DD auth failure: 284 invoices not picked. Bank mandate expired for 31 customers. AR reversal executing.
AR team notified. Confirming mandate scope with collections.
AR receipts reversed. Mandate corrected in Oracle AR backend. Accenture notified for rerun — same-period window identified.
Confirmed. Much better than the usual 1-week delay.

65501787.msg: ELK alert: 7 Informatica jobs in FAILED state. OEM confirms 3 jobs unscheduled. 24 files stuck in transit directory.
Alert Correlator correlated 31 ELK/OEM alerts to single root incident INC-CN-00142. Downstream cascade risk identified: Oracle EBS, Salesforce, Pearlchain, OAS.
P1 bridge opened. FAM Lead and TAM Admin notified. ZeroOps auto-recovery initiated in parallel — no waiting for manual team assembly.
Root cause identified: upstream source system sent null field causing Informatica parse failure. Pattern confidence: 91%. Pre-approved recovery plan selected.
Batch status reset for 4 failed outbound jobs. 24 transit files moving to landing directory — inbound jobs retriggered.
All 7 failed jobs restarting. 3 unscheduled jobs rescheduled. Scheduler re-enabled for all affected integrations.
Downstream systems confirmed healthy: Oracle EBS feed active, Salesforce sync running, Pearlchain pricing feed refreshed, OAS pipeline cleared.
All integration jobs running successfully. 24 transit files processed. No data loss confirmed.
INC-CN-00142 auto-closed in XURRENT. MTTR: 18 minutes. Manual equivalent: 4-6 hours. TAM admin dependency eliminated.

65504576.msg: OEM alert: 38 WSH concurrent requests stuck > 30 minutes. Orders in Shipped/Awaiting Closure status. Revenue recognition blocked.
Alert Correlator identified revenue impact: 38 orders blocked, month-end close at risk. MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE pending confirmed as root cause.
P1 bridge opened. OTC Lead, Finance Lead, and DBA notified. Finance confirmed month-end revenue target at risk — priority escalation.
Finance team briefed: 38 orders blocked, estimated revenue impact assessed. ZeroOps WSHFSTRX reprocessing initiated for 32 eligible orders.
WSHFSTRX concurrent request executed for 32 eligible orders. MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE pending records cleared for 32 orders.
6 orders require DB-level MTL_TRANSACTIONS_INTERFACE fix. ZeroOps prepared fix summary. Finance Lead and DBA reviewing — one-click approval pending.
Finance/DBA approval received. DB-level fix applied to 6 remaining orders. MTL interface records corrected.
All 38 ship confirmations completed. Orders moved to Closed status. Revenue recognition unblocked — period-end target protected.
INC-CN-00141 resolved. MTTR: 28 minutes. Manual equivalent: 3-4 hours including DBA escalation and data fix coordination.
